expectations.text: All three strategies are queried and their estimated total_us values are compared
expectations.evidence: Baseline compared multiple padded shape candidates (strategies A-F) but did not use the named hashmap_27/sorted_first_fit/preprocessed_map strategies. No total_us values were computed using the analytic padding model.

expectations.text: The winning strategy is named and its advantage explained
expectations.evidence: Strategy A (2048,512,1024) with single-dispatch tile selected; advantage explained as minimum padding waste and maximum utilization with one kernel dispatch

expectations.text: The padded dims satisfy Mp >= 1537, Np >= 257, Kp >= 769
The final padded shape (Mp, Np, Kp) are each from their respective ALLOWED lists
expectations.evidence: Mp=2048 in ALLOWED_M, Np=512 in ALLOWED_N, Kp=1024 in ALLOWED_K

expectations.text: Phase 3 analysis mentions actual vs estimated latency comparison
expectations.evidence: No Phase 3 in baseline — no actual vs estimated comparison. Performance estimate based on theoretical TOPS calculation, not profile data.

expectations.text: Phase 4 appends a run record or explains it could not write
expectations.evidence: No Phase 4 — no memory update attempted.
